title: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
company: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
